description: A bounded independent advisory. Rich reasoning belongs in analysis, not additional fields.

status.description: Whether the supplied evidence supports a bounded opinion.

verdict.description: The recommended decision or the concise reason advice is not supportable.

confidence.description: Confidence in the verdict given only the supplied evidence.

analysis.description: Markdown analysis covering facts and evidence, inferences and assumptions, options and tradeoffs, minimum controls, operational failure modes, decision and estimate or ADR implications, and open questions where applicable.

material_risks.description: Material risks that could change or invalidate the verdict.

conditions_that_change_it.description: Specific evidence or conditions that would change the verdict.

validation_steps.description: Concrete checks needed before acting on the verdict.
